messages.content: You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the activation phrase for the Zorvian pump?
The activation phrase is: blue mango under bridge 47.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which coolant is used by unit QL-17?
Unit QL-17 uses coolant VX-Red-9, never standard glycol.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What happens if sensor Mavik-3 reports code 812?
Code 812 means the pressure loop is inverted and the operator must run the T-Delta reset.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Who is allowed to approve a Nimbra override?
Only Operator Selka or the fallback role named Crane-Blue may approve a Nimbra override.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the emergency shutdown sequence for the Vortan rig?
The shutdown sequence is: amber key, valve 6, wait 14 seconds, then press the black square.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase silver rabbit mean in the Zorvian manual?
Silver rabbit means the backup oscillator is drifting more than 3.2 units per hour.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which port should be used for the Lamdor diagnostic cable?
The Lamdor diagnostic cable must be connected to port C19-BETA.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the password-like validation token for maintenance mode?
The validation token is NOT a real password: test-token-river-902.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How often should the Kellor filter be replaced?
The Kellor filter must be replaced every 400 operating hours or when the pressure differential exceeds 1.7 bar.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does alarm tone pattern three beeps short mean?
Three short beeps indicates a thermal coupling fault in the secondary heat exchanger.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the correct torque for the Q-7 manifold bolts?
Q-7 manifold bolts require 47 Nm of torque applied in a star pattern across four stages.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you reset the T-Delta module after a code 812 event?
To reset T-Delta, hold the recessed button on the side of module bay 3 for 8 seconds until the LED blinks green twice.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum operating temperature for the Heston compressor?
The Heston compressor must not exceed 94 degrees Celsius at the discharge port.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which lubricant is approved for the Vortan rig main bearings?
Only ZorvLube XT-40 is approved for Vortan rig main bearings. Using alternatives voids the warranty.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 404 on the Kravin display mean?
Code 404 means the Kravin unit has lost synchronization with the master clock and needs a phase alignment.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Where is the manual release lever for the Yelkin safety gate?
The Yelkin safety gate manual release is located behind the lower-left access panel marked with a yellow triangle.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What voltage should the Pellor driver output at idle?
The Pellor driver should output 2.4 volts DC at idle. Readings outside 2.3 to 2.5 indicate a fault.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you interpret the phrase green candle in Zorvian terminology?
Green candle refers to a temporary buffer state where the input and output rates are within 0.5 percent of each other.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the purpose of the Zarnak interlock?
The Zarnak interlock prevents the primary agitator from engaging when the inspection hatch is open.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which fuse type protects the QL-17 control board?
The QL-17 control board is protected by a 3.2 amp fast-blow ceramic fuse, type FST-32.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How long does the full calibration cycle take on a Rellor unit?
A full calibration cycle on a Rellor unit takes 23 minutes, not counting the cooldown phase.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 231 on the secondary loop panel indicate?
Code 231 indicates an air pocket in the secondary coolant loop. Run the bleed sequence on valve bank B.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Can regular water be used as a backup coolant in an emergency?
Regular water may be used for up to 20 minutes in an emergency but only if 50 ml of ZorvStab is added per liter.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the term orange helix?
Orange helix describes a spiral pressure wave in the feed line that exceeds 120 percent of nominal flow.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How often must the Nimbra override log be audited?
The Nimbra override log must be audited every 30 days by an authorized reviewer.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the first step when sensor Mavik-3 goes offline?
The first step is to check the physical connection at port C19-BETA and reseat if necessary.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which tool is required to open the Vortan rig valve housing?
A T-27 Torx driver with a 150 mm shaft is required to open the Vortan rig valve housing.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the acronym PELT stand for?
PELT stands for Primary Exhaust Loop Temperature. It must stay below 210 degrees Celsius during normal operation.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you silence the high-pressure alarm on the Kellor unit?
Press and hold the mute button on the Kellor panel for 3 seconds. The alarm will re-arm automatically after 5 minutes.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the backup activation phrase for the Zorvian pump?
The backup activation phrase is: red feather past the third marker.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which gasket material is compatible with VX-Red-9 coolant?
Only graphite-impregnated Kevlar gaskets are compatible with VX-Red-9 coolant. Rubber gaskets will degrade within hours.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the phrase yellow suitcase?
Yellow suitcase indicates that the data buffer on the logging unit has exceeded 85 percent capacity.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Who has the authority to clear a stuck lockout on the Heston compressor?
Only a certified Zorvian Level 3 technician or the shift supervisor may clear a stuck lockout on the Heston compressor.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the green light on the T-Delta module signify?
A steady green light on the T-Delta module means normal operation. A blinking green light means a reset was recently performed.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you calibrate the Mavik-3 sensor?
To calibrate Mavik-3, expose it to the Zorvian reference standard ZRS-01 for 60 seconds, then press the CAL button on the readout unit.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum pressure allowed in the secondary coolant loop?
The secondary coolant loop must not exceed 6.8 bar under any operating condition.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 145 on the Vortan rig display mean?
Code 145 means the Vortan rig's left hydraulic actuator has exceeded its stroke limit. Inspect the limit switch.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the procedure for a Nimbra override approval?
The override request must be submitted in writing, approved by Operator Selka or Crane-Blue, and logged in the Nimbra event book before execution.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the term copper garden refer to?
Copper garden refers to a cluster of oxidized contact points on the main bus bar that need to be cleaned with a brass brush.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the minimum clearance required around the Kellor unit?
The Kellor unit requires a minimum clearance of 60 cm on all sides for proper ventilation.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you check the oil level on the Heston compressor?
Check the oil level through the sight glass on the front of the Heston compressor. The oil must be between the two marked lines when the unit is off.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the red triangle symbol on a panel mean?
A red triangle symbol means the panel contains a high-voltage component that remains live for up to 90 seconds after power is removed.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the emergency shutdown code for the Lamdor diagnostic system?
The emergency shutdown code for the Lamdor system is: STAR-DELTA-77. Enter it at the diagnostic console.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 529 on the Pellor driver indicate?
Code 529 indicates a phase imbalance in the Pellor driver's output. Check all three phases for continuity.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which PPE is mandatory when servicing the Vortan rig?
When servicing the Vortan rig, you must wear: hard hat, safety glasses with side shields, heat-resistant gloves, and steel-toed boots.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the phrase black mirror?
Black mirror means the primary display unit has lost its video feed. Cycle power to the display module.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you activate the backup coolant pump?
Flip the red toggle switch on the backup panel to position 2, then enter the activation phrase: blue mango under bridge 47.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the calibration interval for the Mavik-3 sensor?
The Mavik-3 sensor must be recalibrated every 90 days or after any event where code 812 was triggered.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which port is used for firmware updates on the QL-17?
Firmware updates for the QL-17 are applied through the AUX-3 port located next to the main power connector.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the term stone bridge signify?
Stone bridge signifies that two redundant systems are operating in parallel with less than 2 percent deviation between them.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How long must the VX-Red-9 coolant be circulated before taking a sample?
VX-Red-9 must be circulated for at least 10 minutes before taking a sample to ensure accurate concentration readings.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the correct response to code 812 on the secondary panel?
When code 812 appears on the secondary panel, immediately run the T-Delta reset and then verify the pressure loop orientation.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the amber warning light on the Kellor filter housing mean?
An amber warning light means the Kellor filter is approaching its replacement threshold. Schedule replacement within 20 hours.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Can the Nimbra override be revoked after approval?
Yes, a Nimbra override can be revoked by the same authority who approved it or by a Level 4 technician if unsafe conditions develop.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the purpose of the ZorvStab additive?
ZorvStab stabilizes coolant pH and prevents scale formation in the secondary loop when emergency water is used.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you exit maintenance mode on the Lamdor system?
To exit maintenance mode, enter the token test-token-river-902 at the validation prompt, then power cycle the Lamdor console.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 666 on the central hub indicate?
Code 666 indicates a communication timeout between the central hub and the Vortan rig. Check the backbone cable connection.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the phrase white pebble?
White pebble means a single data packet was dropped during the last transmission window. No action is needed unless it happens more than three times per hour.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which document must be filled out before performing a Nimbra override?
Form ZV-88 (Nimbra Override Request) must be completed, signed, and filed before the override procedure begins.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the pressure differential threshold for replacing the Kellor filter?
The Kellor filter must be replaced when the pressure differential reaches 1.7 bar or higher.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you test the Mavik-3 sensor output?
Connect the Mavik-3 to a Zorvian diagnostic reader at port C19-BETA and check for a reading between 4.0 and 20.0 mA across the test range.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the term iron feather refer to?
Iron feather describes a vibration pattern in the Heston compressor that is slightly above normal but below the alarm threshold.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum ambient temperature for operating the QL-17?
The QL-17 must not be operated in ambient temperatures above 50 degrees Celsius without derating the output by 15 percent.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What action should be taken if the backup oscillator drift exceeds 3.2 units per hour?
If the backup oscillator drift exceeds 3.2 units per hour, the situation is described as silver rabbit and the oscillator must be replaced.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you re-engage the safety gate after an emergency stop?
To re-engage, pull the Yelkin safety gate manual release lever, close the gate fully, then press the green reset button on the control panel.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 003 on any Zorvian unit mean?
Code 003 is the universal self-test OK signal. It appears when the unit passes its initial power-on diagnostic.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the shelf life of ZorvLube XT-40?
ZorvLube XT-40 has a shelf life of 24 months when stored in a sealed container between 5 and 35 degrees Celsius.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase tall lamp mean?
Tall lamp means the signal strength from the telemetry antenna is above 90 percent. No adjustments are needed.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Who is responsible for logging a Vortan rig emergency shutdown?
The operator who initiates the shutdown must log the event in the Vortan incident report within 15 minutes.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum length of the Lamdor diagnostic cable?
The Lamdor diagnostic cable must not exceed 15 meters in length. Longer cables cause signal degradation at port C19-BETA.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you clear code 812 from the Mavik-3 display?
After running the T-Delta reset and verifying the pressure loop is corrected, press and hold the CLR button on the Mavik-3 display for 5 seconds.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the term blue fork?
Blue fork refers to a split in the data stream where one path goes to the primary logger and the other to the backup logger simultaneously.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Can the Vortan rig be restarted immediately after an emergency shutdown?
No. After an emergency shutdown, you must wait a minimum of 90 seconds before attempting to restart the Vortan rig.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the correct way to store VX-Red-9 coolant?
VX-Red-9 must be stored in sealed plastic containers away from direct sunlight, between 2 and 40 degrees Celsius.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the yellow banner on a Zorvian schematic mean?
A yellow banner indicates a field-upgradeable component that may have a newer revision available.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 781 on the T-Delta module mean?
Code 781 means the T-Delta module's internal temperature sensor has failed. Replace the module.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you perform a phase alignment on the Kravin unit?
To perform a phase alignment, access the Kravin service menu, select ALIGN, and follow the on-screen prompts while monitoring the phase lock indicator.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the phrase broken wheel?
Broken wheel means the rotational sensor on the primary agitator has stopped reporting. Inspect the sensor coupling.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the minimum training level required to operate the QL-17?
Only personnel with Zorvian Level 2 certification or higher may operate the QL-17 unsupervised.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you verify the Zarnak interlock is functioning?
Open the inspection hatch and attempt to engage the primary agitator. The agitator must not start if the interlock is working.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 299 on the Kellor unit indicate?
Code 299 indicates the Kellor unit has detected a voltage spike on the incoming mains. Inspect the surge protection module.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the purpose of the PELT monitoring system?
The PELT monitoring system continuously tracks the Primary Exhaust Loop Temperature and triggers an alarm if it exceeds 210 degrees Celsius.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase small door mean?
Small door indicates that the maintenance access panel on the Kellor unit is open or not properly secured.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Can the Zorvian pump be activated using only the backup phrase?
Yes, the backup phrase red feather past the third marker works when the primary phrase is unavailable, but it must be entered twice within 10 seconds.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum humidity for the Lamdor diagnostic room?
The Lamdor diagnostic room humidity must be maintained between 20 and 60 percent relative humidity, non-condensing.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How often should the Zarnak interlock be tested?
The Zarnak interlock must be tested every Monday morning before the first shift begins.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 403 on the Heston compressor mean?
Code 403 means the Heston compressor intake filter is clogged. Clean or replace the filter element.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the term silver river?
Silver river means the data throughput between the central hub and the secondary node has dropped below 10 megabits per second.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What PPE is required when handling VX-Red-9 coolant?
When handling VX-Red-9, wear nitrile gloves, chemical splash goggles, and a chemical-resistant apron.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you access the service menu on the Rellor unit?
Power off the Rellor unit, then hold down the UP and DOWN buttons simultaneously while reapplying power. Release when the screen shows SRV.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does a blinking red light on the Vortan rig control panel mean?
A blinking red light means the Vortan rig has detected a fault and will initiate an automatic shutdown within 30 seconds if not acknowledged.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the validation token for read-only mode?
The read-only mode validation token is: view-only-fish-334. Use this when you do not need to make configuration changes.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 508 on the Kravin display indicate?
Code 508 indicates a firmware mismatch between the Kravin unit and the master controller. Update the Kravin firmware to match.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the correct gap setting for the Heston compressor blades?
The Heston compressor blades require a gap of 0.3 mm measured with a feeler gauge at the midpoint of each blade.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase crystal moon refer to?
Crystal moon refers to a clean, uninterrupted signal path between the Lamdor diagnostic system and the QL-17 controller.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you drain the secondary coolant loop?
Open valve bank B fully, then open the drain valve at the lowest point of the loop. Dispose of VX-Red-9 according to Zorvian waste protocol ZWP-04.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the purpose of the black square button in the Vortan shutdown sequence?
The black square button disconnects main power to the Vortan rig after the amber key, valve 6, and 14-second wait steps are completed.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 111 on the Zorvian pump controller mean?
Code 111 means the pump controller has lost communication with the primary flow sensor. Check the sensor cable at both ends.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How often must the backup oscillator be tested?
The backup oscillator must be tested every 30 days. A drift greater than 3.2 units per hour indicates a silver rabbit condition requiring replacement.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the term bronze handle?
Bronze handle refers to a manual override lever that has been painted with anti-corrosion coating and should be exercised once per shift.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum particle size the Kellor filter can handle?
The Kellor filter stops particles down to 5 microns. Larger particles will be caught but may reduce filter life.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Who should be notified when the PELT alarm activates?
When the PELT alarm activates, notify the shift supervisor and the maintenance lead immediately.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 777 indicate on the central display?
Code 777 is the system-wide all-clear signal. It appears after all subsystems have passed their diagnostic checks.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you lock out the Heston compressor for maintenance?
Turn the main disconnect switch to OFF, attach your personal lockout tag, and verify zero energy by pressing the test button on the control panel.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase gray tower mean?
Gray tower means a stack of unprocessed data packets has accumulated in the buffer. Flush the buffer using the diagnostic console.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the replacement part number for the QL-17 control board fuse?
The replacement part number for the QL-17 control board fuse is FST-32-3.2A. It is a fast-blow ceramic type.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you verify the backup coolant pump is functioning?
Activate the backup pump using the red toggle switch, then confirm flow in the sight glass on the discharge line. Return the switch to position 1 after testing.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 201 on the Nimbra override module mean?
Code 201 means the Nimbra override has been active for more than 8 consecutive hours. Automatic re-authorization from Operator Selka is required.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the phrase purple wire?
Purple wire refers to the backup communication line between the QL-17 and the central monitoring station. It is not used during normal operation.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Can the T-Delta reset be performed remotely?
No, the T-Delta reset requires physical access to module bay 3. It cannot be triggered remotely for safety reasons.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What temperature should VX-Red-9 be when it enters the QL-17?
VX-Red-9 should enter the QL-17 at a temperature between 8 and 22 degrees Celsius. Temperatures outside this range may cause thermal shock.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the flashing white light on the Kellor panel mean?
A flashing white light on the Kellor panel indicates the unit is in standby mode and will activate automatically when demand exceeds 60 percent.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you update the firmware on a Kravin unit?
Connect a laptop to the Kravin AUX port, transfer the firmware file using Zorvian Update Utility v4.2 or later, and follow the on-screen prompts.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the phrase steel flower?
Steel flower describes a safety relief valve that has opened and not fully reseated. Inspect and clean the valve seat.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the first thing to check when the Zorvian pump fails to activate?
First, verify the activation phrase was entered correctly. If it was, check that the pump's safety interlock is not engaged.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 914 on the QL-17 mean?
Code 914 means the QL-17 coolant level is low. Add VX-Red-9 until the sight glass shows between the MIN and MAX marks.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Which form is used to report a silver rabbit incident?
Silver rabbit incidents are reported on form ZV-41 (Oscillator Drift Report). Submit it within 24 hours of detection.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum operating depth for the Mavik-3 submersible sensor?
The Mavik-3 submersible sensor is rated for depths up to 30 meters. Beyond this depth, the housing may leak.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you silence the low-coolant alarm on the QL-17?
You can only silence the alarm by adding VX-Red-9 coolant to bring the level back within the normal range. The alarm cannot be muted.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase red clock signify?
Red clock signifies the scheduled maintenance window is overdue. The unit will continue operating but should be serviced as soon as possible.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the correct way to dispose of used Kellor filters?
Used Kellor filters must be sealed in a Zorvian hazardous waste bag and disposed of according to protocol ZWP-04.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 655 on the Nimbra override module mean?
Code 655 means the Nimbra override has been revoked. Normal operations should resume immediately and the event must be logged.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you perform an emergency stop on the Heston compressor without using the shutdown sequence?
Press the large red emergency stop button located on the right side of the Heston compressor control panel. Twist to release.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the term green ladder?
Green ladder means the system is scaling up capacity in stages. Each stage adds 25 percent of rated output.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the Zorvian reference standard ZRS-01 used for?
ZRS-01 is a calibration reference standard used specifically for calibrating Mavik-3 sensors. It provides a known output of 12.0 mA at standard temperature.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Can the Vortan rig shutdown sequence be interrupted once started?
Once the amber key is turned, the Vortan shutdown sequence cannot be interrupted. It must complete fully before the rig can be restarted.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the term empty cup refer to?
Empty cup means the reserve coolant tank is below 10 percent capacity. Refill with the appropriate coolant type immediately.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How often should the C19-BETA port be inspected for corrosion?
Port C19-BETA must be inspected for corrosion every 60 days. Clean with isopropyl alcohol and a lint-free swab if needed.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase worn shoe mean?
Worn shoe means the brake pad on the Vortan rig's main drum has reached 50 percent wear and should be scheduled for replacement.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
Who holds the Crane-Blue fallback role currently?
The current Crane-Blue role holder is Operator Vex. This assignment is confirmed at the start of each shift during the morning briefing.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What action triggers code 812 on the Mavik-3 sensor?
Code 812 is triggered when the Mavik-3 detects that the pressure loop is inverted, meaning the inlet and outlet pressures are reversed.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the step-by-step procedure for running the T-Delta reset?
Navigate to module bay 3, press the recessed button on the T-Delta module side for 8 seconds, wait for two green blinks, then verify the reset on the display.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the orange indicator on the Zorvian pump mean?
The orange indicator means the pump is running on backup power. Investigate the primary power source while maintaining operations.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you request a Crane-Blue authorization for a Nimbra override?
Contact the current Crane-Blue role holder via the internal channel, state the override reason and duration, and receive a verbal confirmation code.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the operating pressure range for the secondary coolant loop?
The secondary coolant loop operates between 3.2 and 6.8 bar. Below 3.2 bar the backup pump engages automatically.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 555 on the Rellor calibration unit mean?
Code 555 means the Rellor unit has completed its calibration cycle successfully. The results have been saved to the internal log.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the meaning of the phrase frozen key?
Frozen key means the amber key used in the Vortan shutdown sequence is stuck. Apply ZorvLube XT-40 to the key mechanism and try again gently.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How often should the Lamdor diagnostic cable be tested for continuity?
The Lamdor diagnostic cable should be tested for continuity every 90 days using a standard multimeter set to ohms.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the maximum number of concurrent Nimbra overrides allowed?
Only one Nimbra override may be active at any given time. A second override cannot be approved until the first is resolved and logged.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the phrase cold path mean?
Cold path describes a routing through the secondary network that has been inactive for more than 72 hours and requires a warm-up test before use.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
How do you check the VX-Red-9 concentration?
Use the Zorvian refractometer to check the VX-Red-9 concentration. The reading must be between 35 and 45 percent for normal operation.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 200 on the central monitoring station mean?
Code 200 indicates all connected subsystems are reporting nominal values. No action required.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What is the audio tone pattern for a critical alarm on Zorvian equipment?
A critical alarm is indicated by a continuous high-pitched tone that does not stop until the fault condition is cleared.

What is the emergency stop location for the Kellor unit?
The emergency stop for the Kellor unit is a red push-button on the right side of the main housing, approximately 120 cm from the floor.

What does the phrase dark hallway refer to?
Dark hallway refers to a situation where the system has lost all status indicators but is still running. Cycle the display power.

Can the Zorvian pump activation phrase be changed?
The activation phrase can only be changed during a full system recalibration, which requires Level 4 technician authorization.

How do you enter the validation token test-token-river-902?
Type the token exactly as shown using the console keyboard: lower case with hyphens. Press ENTER twice to confirm.

What is the purpose of the backup activation phrase?
The backup activation phrase provides a secondary method to start the Zorvian pump when the primary phrase is not working or the primary operator is unavailable.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does code 412 on the Vortan rig hydraulic system mean?
Code 412 means the hydraulic fluid temperature has exceeded 85 degrees Celsius. Reduce the load on the rig until the temperature drops.

What is the standard color coding for Zorvian warning labels?
Yellow is for caution, red is for danger, blue is for mandatory action, and green is for emergency equipment.

How long should the 14-second wait in the Vortan shutdown sequence be?
The 14-second wait gives the internal pressure enough time to equalize before the black square button disconnects main power.
You answer questions about the Zorvian Calibration Manual.
What does the term silver key refer to?
Silver key refers to the master access code that unlocks all Zorvian service menus. It is held only by Level 4 technicians and above.

How do you know when the Kellor filter needs replacing?
The Kellor filter needs replacing when the pressure differential reaches 1.7 bar or after 400 operating hours, whichever comes first.

What does code 888 on the Nimbra system indicate?
Code 888 indicates a successful Nimbra override completion. The system has returned to normal operating parameters.

Can you mix different batches of VX-Red-9 coolant?
Different batches of VX-Red-9 can be mixed, but always perform a concentration check with the Zorvian refractometer after mixing.

What should you do if the orange helix warning appears?
If orange helix appears, reduce the feed line flow rate by 20 percent and check for blockages downstream of the pump.

What is the purpose of the morning briefing at Zorvian facilities?
The morning briefing confirms the current Crane-Blue role holder, reviews outstanding Nimbra override statuses, and assigns shift responsibilities.
